problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
hypothesis: Hydrogel swelling/shrinking response may resolve Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
